title: Non-record: Mamba-Inspired SSM Hybrid 3:1 (val_bpb 3.3168)
author: dentity007

data.description: Pure PyTorch state-space model hybrid with a 3:1 ratio of SSM to attention blocks following Qwen3-Next/Kimi Linear pattern.
Uses selective gating with input-dependent state transitions.
Includes causal Conv1d in the SSM block.

novel_contributions: Pure PyTorch SSM implementation with no custom CUDA kernels
3:1 SSM-to-attention hybrid block ratio inspired by Qwen3-Next/Kimi Linear
Selective gating with input-dependent state transitions
